scripts.clean: node --input-type=module --eval "import { rm } from 'node:fs/promises'; await Promise.all(['packages/steam-core/dist','packages/steam-mcp/dist','packages/steam-core/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo','packages/steam-mcp/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo'].map((path) => rm(path, { recursive: true, force: true })));"
